column5: Could expand. Continuously subject to change, obviously, but my film analysis brain feels especially sharp right now so I’m confident in this initial unranked selection (except for #1) Honorable mentions: - Anora - Beau Is Afraid - The Boy and the Heron - The Brutalist - Close - C'mon C'mon - The Fabelmans - The Father - Guillermo del Toro’s Pinocchio - Hard Truths - Hundreds of Beavers - Killers of the Flower Moon - Mad God - Mass - Never Rarely Sometimes Always - Oppenheimer - Petite Maman - The Seed of the Sacred Fig - Waiting for the Light to Change
